templates.title: Event templates
templates.description: Save approved event configuration for reuse, review every copied field, and create a new event through a fresh draft workflow.
templates.safety_description: People, registrations, answers, attendance, tickets, transactions, delivery history, federation identifiers and publication state are never copied.
templates.load_error_description: The template library could not be loaded. Please try again.
templates.load_more_error: More templates could not be loaded.
templates.empty_description: Save an event as a template to build a reusable, reviewed configuration library.
templates.never_copied_description: These operational and private records always stay with the source event.

checks.event_template_check_source_manage: You still have permission to manage the source event
checks.event_template_check_allowlist_exact: Only the approved configuration allowlist is included
checks.event_template_check_private_records_ski: Private and operational records are excluded
checks.event_template_check_versioned_snapshot: The configuration is stored as an immutable versioned snapshot
checks.event_template_check_version_current: The selected template version is current
checks.event_template_check_schedule_valid: The new schedule is valid and in the future
checks.event_template_check_federation_none: Federation is disabled for the new draft
checks.event_template_check_canonical_writer: The canonical event creation workflow will be used

capture.preview_error: The template preview could not be prepared.
capture.save_error: The template could not be saved.
capture.revised: Event template refreshed from its source.
capture.safe_description: The server verified the exact allowlist and excluded private and operational records.

archive.title: Archive event template?
archive.description: Archive {{title}}? Existing audit and usage evidence will be retained.
archive.error: The event template could not be archived.
archive.reason_recorded: An archive reason is recorded in the retained audit history.

templates.audit_error_description: The immutable template history could not be loaded.

materialize.title: Use {{title}}
materialize.draft_only_description: Nothing is published, registered, notified or federated until you review and publish the new event separately.
materialize.overrides_description: Adjust reusable configuration for this draft. Operational and private data cannot be added here.
materialize.validation_description: Enter a title, time zone and valid future schedule. An all-day event also needs an end date.
materialize.preview_error: The draft preview could not be prepared.
materialize.ready_description: The server verified the current version, safe allowlist, schedule, federation setting and canonical writer.
materialize.create_error: The new event draft could not be created.
